# WannaCry IOC References (Text Reference Only)
# DO NOT store actual malware samples in this repository.

# Mutex
MsWinZonesCacheCounterMutexA

# Killswitch Domain
iuqerfsodp9ifjaposdfjhgosurijfaewrwergwea.com

# File Extensions
.wncry
.wcry
.WNCRYT

# Ransom Note Files
@Please_Read_Me@.txt
@WanaDecryptor@.exe

# Process Names
tasksche.exe
WanaDecryptor.exe

# Registry Keys
HKLM\SOFTWARE\WanaCrypt0r

# SMB Port
445

# Strings in binary
WANACRY!
Wanna Decryptor
WanaCrypt0r
wcry@123
TaskStart

# References
# MITRE ATT&CK: https://attack.mitre.org/software/S0366/
# CISA Alert: https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ncas/alerts/TA17-132A
